@ prod-8-3:
(((3 * 4) - 9) * 8)
(8 * ((3 * 4) - 9))
(((4 * 3) - 9) * 8)
(8 * ((4 * 3) - 9))

@ prod-12-8-div-4:
(((3 + 9) / 4) * 8)
((3 + 9) / (4 / 8))
(((3 + 9) * 8) / 4)
((3 + 9) * (8 / 4))
((8 * (3 + 9)) / 4)
((8 / 4) * (3 + 9))
((8 / 4) * (9 + 3))
(8 / (4 / (3 + 9)))
(8 / (4 / (9 + 3)))
((8 * (9 + 3)) / 4)
(8 * ((9 + 3) / 4))
(((9 + 3) / 4) * 8)
((9 + 3) / (4 / 8))
(((9 + 3) * 8) / 4)
((9 + 3) * (8 / 4))
(8 * ((3 + 9) / 4))

@ prod-6-4:
((3 - 9) * (4 - 8))
((4 - 8) * (3 - 9))
((8 - 4) * (9 - 3))
((9 - 3) * (8 - 4))
